CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓

## AC Results
- AC1 (>=10 closed tickets): PASS (115 closed, 20 with desc >=200 chars used)
- AC2 (calibration comment on epic): PASS
- AC3 (bash tests/run-all.sh): PARTIAL — ticket-clarity-check tests all PASS (16/16); 2 pre-existing failures in unrelated tests (test_preplanning_integration_research, test_sprint_completion_verifier_enforcement)
- AC4 (ruff check): PASS (exit 0)
- AC5 (ruff format --check): PASS (exit 0)

## Calibration Summary
- 17/20 well-formed tickets (desc >=200 chars) scored >=5 (PASS, threshold was >=15/20)
- 0/14 short tickets (desc <100 chars) scored >=5 (PASS)
- Threshold of 5 is well-calibrated — no adjustment needed
